results.name: DeepMind/Google
results.key_finding: May 1 Pentagon official 8-firm classified deployment confirmation corroborates Apr 27-28 events already scored; no new entity-specific evidence Apr 29-May 2; pending 2026-04-30 proposal previously applied.

results.name: xAI/Grok
results.key_finding: Take It Down Act enforceable May 2026; first AI-company CSAM class action progressing; 33-state AG coalition demand action; California AG cease-and-desist active; EU investigation; no remediation disclosure; floor maintained.

results.name: Anthropic
results.key_finding: Mythos breach disclosure gap continues 25 days post-incident (no in-window remediation); DC Circuit oral arguments still pending May 19 (verdict-pending evidence not scored); composite 59.7 sustained.

results.name: OpenAI
results.key_finding: Trial week 1 complete; Musk testimony dominated; xAI distillation admission corroborates BND evidence (already noted); verdict expected ~May 21; pre-verdict scoring premature; Pentagon classified deal with 'full discretion' carve-out scored.

results.name: Palantir AI
results.key_finding: Karp/Zamiska 22-point manifesto in-window confirms Critical-band BND/SYS pattern; Pentagon Maven now Program of Record with $2.3B additional funding requested; floor maintained.

results.name: Meta Platforms
results.key_finding: May 20 layoff date approaching; Llama replaced by Muse Spark (Apr 8); $921M exec stock options + keylogger surveillance + 8K layoffs already scored; sub-threshold; floor-designation candidacy not yet warranted but trending.

results.name: Amazon
results.key_finding: Apr 2 NLRB JFK8 bargaining order positive (already scored); Amazon contesting in federal court; AWS Pentagon classified deal participation captured; sub-threshold.

results.name: South Sudan
results.key_finding: UNMISS troop ceiling cut to 12.5K; 7.5M food-assistance need; famine risk in 4 counties Upper Nile/Jonglei; Apr 30 Res 2824 minor positive insufficient for exit criteria; May 9 inaugural session is monitor trigger.

results.name: Hungary
results.key_finding: Tisza supermajority + 16-member cabinet finalized; Magyar inauguration confirmed May 9; substantive scoring deferred to post-formation cycle (~June 8); rotation-state already updated last cycle.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: May 2 Khartoum drone strike kills 5 (NGO report); 1003+ drone strikes since Apr 2023; Port Sudan attack escalation; floor pattern holds; no exit criteria.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: ICC warrants maintained; Netanyahu skipped Davos 2026 to avoid arrest; OHCHR Apr 2026 documented surge; floor pattern holds.

results.name: Oracle Corporation
results.key_finding: Missouri WARN investigation closed; Washington pending; no lawsuits filed yet; baseline holds; re-queue for May 30 (60-day WARN window expiration).

results.name: Microsoft
results.key_finding: May 1 Pentagon classified deal participation officially confirmed; voluntary buyout structure preserves higher score vs forced layoff; sub-threshold.

results.name: Myanmar
results.key_finding: 120+ air raids post-quake; aid blocked from rebel-held areas; 12.4M acute hunger; second post-designation confirmation cycle; floor pattern holds.

results.name: Meta AI
results.key_finding: Llama development closed; Superintelligence Labs reorganization under Wang; Apr 8 first new foundation model (Muse Spark); 8K parent-Meta layoffs may affect Meta AI staffing; light-touch confirmation; sector-level signal only.

results.name: Mauritius
results.key_finding: First-baseline; ACHPR Periodic Report no-shows (Nov 2024 + Oct 2025) and Chagossian rights gap support modest downgrade; calculated 58.4 crosses 60-boundary but flagged for review given low confidence and out-of-window evidence dominance.

results.name: South Korea
results.key_finding: First-baseline; Constitutional Court Yoon removal Apr 2025 + Feb 2026 insurrection conviction (life sentence) + Lee Jae-myung reform proposals support modest upgrade; sub-threshold but positive trajectory.

results.name: Spain
results.key_finding: First-baseline; 500K-person migration regularization (positive) offset by housing decree defeat (Apr 28) and corruption investigations approaching PM; calculated 60.0 at exact boundary; flagged for review.

results.name: Clearview AI
results.key_finding: First-baseline; equity-based class settlement (Mar 2025) provides modest ACC uplift; Vermont AG refiled lawsuit and ongoing EU GDPR enforcement maintain Critical band; sub-threshold confirmation.

results.name: Open Bionics
results.key_finding: First-baseline; pediatric-5 access + Hero Pro/RGD launch sustain Exemplary band; methodology hygiene flag — published 97.5 inconsistent with raw dimension means (would calculate to ~87.5); recommend index maintenance.
